title: tengine.session.warmup_complete v1
description: Silo warmup finished; socket is ready and workshop warmup frames have completed. Producer: registry handle SESSION_WARMUP_COMPLETE in crates/tengine-dgc-hal/src/silo/shadergen_handlers/track_group.rs (H5 — session warmup-complete event).

session_dir.description: Absolute path to the session directory.

frame.description: GPU frame index at which warmup completed.

pid.description: OS process id of the silo.
